query: What are the technical specifications of the ProScan X120?

candidates.candidate_text: ProScan X120 Datasheet: Resolution — 1200 DPI optical, 4800 DPI interpolated. Scan speed — 40 ppm (pages per minute) at 300 DPI. Connectivity — USB 3.0, Wi-Fi 6, Ethernet. Supported media — up to A3, 300 gsm. Daily duty cycle — 5,000 scans. Document feeder — 100-sheet automatic.

ProScan X120 User Manual: Chapter 1 — Product Overview. Dimensions: 585 x 450 x 310 mm. Weight: 15.2 kg. Power: 100-240 V AC, 50/60 Hz. Operating temperature: 10-35 C. Supported file formats: PDF, TIFF, JPEG, PNG. Software included: ProScan Suite v4.2.

Knowledge base: ProScan X120 troubleshooting guide — common issues include paper jams at the feeder (solution: clean rollers with isopropyl alcohol), connectivity drops on Wi-Fi (solution: update firmware), and scan quality degradation (solution: calibrate sensor).
Wiki: ProScan X100 product overview — entry-level scanner for small offices. 600 DPI resolution, 25 ppm scan speed, USB 2.0 only. Discontinued as of 2025. Successor model is ProScan X120.
Forum discussion: 'Comparing document scanners for accounting — ProScan X120 vs Fujitsu fi-7300NX.' Users discuss scan quality, software compatibility, and total cost of ownership.
